documentation.file_docstring: Wait for compaction retry completion with an aggregate timeout to avoid holding a session lane indefinitely when retry resolution is lost.
inline_comments: Keep extending the timeout window while compaction is actively running.
We only trigger the fallback timeout once compaction appears idle.

functions.name: waitForCompactionRetryWithAggregateTimeout
functions.doc: Wait for compaction retry completion with an aggregate timeout to avoid   holding a session lane indefinitely when retry
